name: openclaw-agent-supabase-mailgun
description: Supabase + Mailgun integration for OpenClaw agent logging, memory storage, and email

scripts.test: npm run test:supabase && npm run test:mailgun
scripts.test:supabase: node -e "const {supabase} = require('./supabase-integration'); console.log('Testing Supabase connection...'); supabase.from('task_log').select('count', { count: 'exact' }).limit(1).then(r => console.log(r.error ? 'ERROR: ' + r.error.message : 'OK: Supabase connected'));"
scripts.test:mailgun:
node -e "const {sendEmail} = require('./supabase-integration'); console.log('Sending test email...'); sendEmail({to: process.env.ALERT_EMAIL, subject: 'Test', html: '

Test

'}).then(() => console.log('Email sent!'));"

author: Abundance
